channel.description: Recent content in word2vec on yizengli.com

item.title: Introduction to Word2vec - Part 2
item.description: A tutorial, focused on Skip-Gram, for Word2vec with model architecture/implementation from scratch in python.

item.title: Introduction to Word2vec - Part 1
item.description: A tutorial, focused on Skip-Gram, for Word2vec with statistical details.
